title: 5 Solid Dividend Growth Stocks for Thanksgiving
text: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM), McKesson (MCK), ParkerHannifin (PH), Booz Allen Hamilton (BAH) and Darden Restaurants (DRI) could be compelling picks for your portfolio this Thanksgiving.

title: DARDEN RESTAURANTS TO HOST FISCAL 2023 SECOND QUARTER CONFERENCE CALL ON DECEMBER 16
text: ORLANDO, Fla. , Nov. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Darden Restaurants, Inc., (NYSE: DRI) plans to release its fiscal 2023 second quarter financial results before the market opens on Friday, December 16, 2022, with a conference call to follow at 8:30 am ET.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Darden (DRI) in Your Portfolio
text: Darden (DRI) focuses on culinary innovation, guest engagement and integrated marketing efforts to drive growth. However, inflationary pressures are a concern.

title: Why Value Investors Should Skip This Restaurant Stock
text: Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) is the parent company of several restaurant brands, including Olive Garden, Seasons 52, Bahama Breeze, and Eddie V's.
